name: Agent Native Templates (First-party)
description: Template engagement and per-app activity recorded through analytics.agent-native.com/track. Source: first-party analytics_events.

panels.title: Signups
panels.sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS count FROM analytics_events WHERE event_name = 'signup'

config.description: Better Auth user creation events from all Agent Native templates

panels.title: Signups Over Time
panels.sql: SELECT substr(timestamp, 1, 10) AS date, COUNT(*) AS count FROM analytics_events WHERE event_name = 'signup' GROUP BY substr(timestamp, 1, 10) ORDER BY date

config.description: Daily signup events across all Agent Native templates

panels.title: Signups by Template
panels.sql: SELECT COALESCE(NULLIF(template, ''), NULLIF(app, ''), 'unknown') AS template, COUNT(*) AS count FROM analytics_events WHERE event_name = 'signup' GROUP BY COALESCE(NULLIF(template, ''), NULLIF(app, ''), 'unknown') ORDER BY count DESC LIMIT 20

config.description: Signup events grouped by inferred template/app

panels.title: Template Clicks
panels.sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS count FROM analytics_events WHERE event_name = 'click template'

panels.title: Demo Clicks
panels.sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS count FROM analytics_events WHERE event_name = 'click try demo'

panels.title: CLI Copies
panels.sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS count FROM analytics_events WHERE event_name = 'copy cli command'

panels.title: Template Interest Over Time
panels.sql: SELECT substr(timestamp, 1, 10) AS date, COUNT(*) AS count FROM analytics_events WHERE event_name = 'click template' GROUP BY substr(timestamp, 1, 10) ORDER BY date

panels.title: Clicks by Template
panels.sql: SELECT COALESCE(NULLIF(template, ''), 'unknown') AS template, COUNT(*) AS count FROM analytics_events WHERE event_name = 'click template' GROUP BY COALESCE(NULLIF(template, ''), 'unknown') ORDER BY count DESC LIMIT 20

panels.title: Try-Demo Clicks by Template
panels.sql: SELECT COALESCE(NULLIF(template, ''), 'unknown') AS template, COUNT(*) AS count FROM analytics_events WHERE event_name = 'click try demo' GROUP BY COALESCE(NULLIF(template, ''), 'unknown') ORDER BY count DESC LIMIT 20

panels.title: CLI Copies by Template
panels.sql: SELECT COALESCE(NULLIF(template, ''), 'unknown') AS template, COUNT(*) AS count FROM analytics_events WHERE event_name = 'copy cli command' GROUP BY COALESCE(NULLIF(template, ''), 'unknown') ORDER BY count DESC LIMIT 20

panels.title: CLI Copies Over Time
panels.sql: SELECT substr(timestamp, 1, 10) AS date, COUNT(*) AS count FROM analytics_events WHERE event_name = 'copy cli command' GROUP BY substr(timestamp, 1, 10) ORDER BY date

panels.title: Sessions by Agent-Native App
panels.sql: SELECT COALESCE(NULLIF(app, ''), 'unknown') AS app, COUNT(*) AS count FROM analytics_events WHERE event_name = 'session status' GROUP BY COALESCE(NULLIF(app, ''), 'unknown') ORDER BY count DESC LIMIT 20

config.description: Per-template-site session activity (mail, calendar, slides, ...). Each tab fires session status once.

panels.title: Signed-In vs Anonymous Sessions
panels.sql: SELECT COALESCE(NULLIF(signed_in, ''), 'unknown') AS signed_in, COUNT(*) AS count FROM analytics_events WHERE event_name = 'session status' GROUP BY COALESCE(NULLIF(signed_in, ''), 'unknown') ORDER BY signed_in

config.description: true = signed in, false = anonymous. Best proxy for total signups per period (still includes returning users).

panels.title: Sessions Over Time
panels.sql: SELECT substr(timestamp, 1, 10) AS date, COUNT(*) AS count FROM analytics_events WHERE event_name = 'session status' GROUP BY substr(timestamp, 1, 10) ORDER BY date

config.description: Signups attributed to shared clips and plans, who is driving referrals, and the share view to click to signup funnel. referral_* and utm_* fields are read from the signup event's properties JSON; share_view and share_cta_click track shared-surface engagement.

panels.title: Referred Signups (30d)
panels.sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS count FROM analytics_events WHERE event_name = 'signup' AND timestamp::timestamptz >= now() - interval '30 days' AND properties::jsonb ->> 'referral_source' IS NOT NULL AND properties::jsonb ->> 'referral_source' <> '' AND properties::jsonb ->> 'referral_source' <> 'direct'

config.description: Signups in the last 30 days with a non-direct referral_source (clip_share, plan_share, external).

panels.title: Viral Signup Share (30d)
panels.sql: SELECT CASE WHEN COUNT(*) = 0 THEN 0 ELSE 1.0 * COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE properties::jsonb ->> 'referral_source' IS NOT NULL AND properties::jsonb ->> 'referral_source' <> '' AND properties::jsonb ->> 'referral_source' <> 'direct') / COUNT(*) END AS rate FROM analytics_events WHERE event_name = 'signup' AND timestamp::timestamptz >= now() - interval '30 days'

config.description: Headline virality number: referred signups divided by all signups over the last 30 days.

panels.title: Clip-Share Signups (30d)
panels.sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS count FROM analytics_events WHERE event_name = 'signup' AND timestamp::timestamptz >= now() - interval '30 days' AND properties::jsonb ->> 'referral_source' = 'clip_share'

config.description: Signups in the last 30 days attributed to a shared clip.

panels.title: Signups by Referral Source (90d)
panels.sql: SELECT COALESCE(NULLIF(properties::jsonb ->> 'referral_source', ''), 'direct') AS referral_source, COUNT(*) AS count FROM analytics_events WHERE event_name = 'signup' AND timestamp::timestamptz >= now() - interval '90 days' GROUP BY COALESCE(NULLIF(properties::jsonb ->> 'referral_source', ''), 'direct') ORDER BY count DESC LIMIT 20

config.description: Signups grouped by referral_source over the last 90 days. Null/empty sources are bucketed as direct.

panels.title: Referred Signups Over Time (90d)
panels.sql: SELECT substr(timestamp, 1, 10) AS date, COUNT(*) AS count FROM analytics_events WHERE event_name = 'signup' AND timestamp::timestamptz >= now() - interval '90 days' AND properties::jsonb ->> 'referral_source' IS NOT NULL AND properties::jsonb ->> 'referral_source' <> '' AND properties::jsonb ->> 'referral_source' <> 'direct' GROUP BY substr(timestamp, 1, 10) ORDER BY date

config.description: Daily referred (non-direct) signups over the last 90 days.

panels.title: Top Referrers (90d)
panels.sql: SELECT properties::jsonb ->> 'referrer_user' AS referrer_user, COUNT(*) AS signups FROM analytics_events WHERE event_name = 'signup' AND timestamp::timestamptz >= now() - interval '90 days' AND properties::jsonb ->> 'referrer_user' IS NOT NULL AND properties::jsonb ->> 'referrer_user' <> '' GROUP BY properties::jsonb ->> 'referrer_user' ORDER BY signups DESC LIMIT 20

config.description: Users (by id) driving the most referred signups over the last 90 days.

panels.title: Share Funnel (30d)
panels.sql: SELECT 'Share views' AS stage, COUNT(*) AS count FROM analytics_events WHERE event_name = 'share_view' AND timestamp::timestamptz >= now() - interval '30 days' UNION ALL SELECT 'CTA clicks' AS stage, COUNT(*) AS count FROM analytics_events WHERE event_name = 'share_cta_click' AND timestamp::timestamptz >= now() - interval '30 days' UNION ALL SELECT 'Clip-share signups' AS stage, COUNT(*) AS count FROM analytics_events WHERE event_name = 'signup' AND timestamp::timestamptz >= now() - interval '30 days' AND properties::jsonb ->> 'referral_source' = 'clip_share'

config.description: View to click to signup funnel for shared surfaces over the last 30 days: share_view, share_cta_click, then clip_share signups.

panels.title: Viral Participation Rate (90d)
panels.sql: SELECT COALESCE(COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE recent.auth_user_id IN (SELECT properties::jsonb ->> 'referrer_user' FROM analytics_events WHERE event_name = 'signup' AND properties::jsonb ->> 'referrer_user' IS NOT NULL AND properties::jsonb ->> 'referrer_user' <> ''))::float / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0), 0) AS rate FROM (SELECT DISTINCT properties::jsonb ->> 'auth_user_id' AS auth_user_id FROM analytics_events WHERE event_name = 'signup' AND timestamp::timestamptz >= now() - interval '90 days' AND properties::jsonb ->> 'auth_user_id' IS NOT NULL AND properties::jsonb ->> 'auth_user_id' <> '') AS recent

config.description: Share of users who signed up in the last 90d who have since referred at least one new signup (referrers counted across all time). New cohorts under-count: recent signups haven't had time to refer yet. Matches auth_user_id to referrer_user (both better-auth ids).

panels.title: Viral Coefficient K (90d)
panels.sql: SELECT COALESCE(COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE properties::jsonb ->> 'referrer_user' IS NOT NULL AND properties::jsonb ->> 'referrer_user' <> '')::float / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT properties::jsonb ->> 'auth_user_id'), 0), 0) AS k FROM analytics_events WHERE event_name = 'signup' AND timestamp::timestamptz >= now() - interval '90 days'

config.description: Viral coefficient (K): referred signups divided by new users over the last 90d. K >= 1 means each user brings on at least one more, i.e. self-sustaining growth.

panels.title: Activated Referrers (90d)
panels.sql: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT properties::jsonb ->> 'referrer_user') AS count FROM analytics_events WHERE event_name = 'signup' AND timestamp::timestamptz >= now() - interval '90 days' AND properties::jsonb ->> 'referrer_user' IS NOT NULL AND properties::jsonb ->> 'referrer_user' <> ''

config.description: Distinct users who drove at least one referred signup in the last 90d (distinct referrer_user on signups in the window).
